name: org-skills
description: Organization-wide Claude Code skills organized by department: Technology, Marketing, Sales, Construction, Hospitality Operations, and Construction Operations.
author: your-org

plugins.name: Technology

plugins.name: Sales
plugins.description: Sales skills: sales playbook, proposal writing, objection handling, and more.

plugins.name: Construction

plugins.name: Hospitality Operations

plugins.name: Construction Operations
